test.command: python3 - <<'PY' ... foundation artifact validation (repo-setup + design-tokens-foundations) ... PY

typecheck.command: python3 - <<'PY' ... JSON structure/type checks for design-system/tokens/*.json ... PY

lint.command: python3 - <<'PY' ... token naming and CSS custom property convention checks ... PY

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow setup/mapping features to validate MCP connectivity with Paper___get_basic_info (instead of requiring Paper___get_node_info on an artboard) when no per-artboard extraction is performed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: repo-setup review observed a followedProcedure=true run that used get_basic_info and still met all requirements.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Separate canonical artboard names from instructional parenthetical notes in the artboard ID reference list.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: ID 347-0 name differs between AGENTS.md ('— Igloo Web App Screens — (divider, skip extraction)') and artboard-map.json ('— Igloo Web App Screens —').

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update screenshot persistence guidance to match observed runtime behavior when Paper___get_screenshot payloads are empty/truncated in tool output, including a reliable fallback path.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: design-tokens-foundations review flagged mismatch between skill instructions and transcript behavior for saving screenshots.
